card.description: Product card with an image and promotional badge.

default-left.css: .commerce-card { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); } .commerce-card > img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4 / 3; object-fit: cover; } .commerce-card__body { display: grid; gap: .6rem; padding: 1rem; } .commerce-card__body h2, .commerce-card__body p { margin: 0; } .commerce-card__body p { color: var(--text-muted); } .commerce-card__body > strong { color: var(--primary); font-size: 1.35rem; } .commerce-card__badge { position: absolute; z-index: 2; top: .6rem; left: .6rem; padding: .25rem .5rem; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--danger); color: white; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 800; }

default-right.css: .commerce-card { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); } .commerce-card > img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4 / 3; object-fit: cover; } .commerce-card__body { display: grid; gap: .6rem; padding: 1rem; } .commerce-card__body h2, .commerce-card__body p { margin: 0; } .commerce-card__body p { color: var(--text-muted); } .commerce-card__body > strong { color: var(--primary); font-size: 1.35rem; } .commerce-card__badge { position: absolute; z-index: 2; top: .6rem; right: .6rem; padding: .25rem .5rem; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--danger); color: white; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 800; }

price.description: Price with an optional previous value and billing period.

default.css: .commerce-price { display: flex; align-items: baseline; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .4rem; margin: 0; } .commerce-price del { color: var(--text-muted); } .commerce-price strong { color: var(--primary); font-size: 1.7rem; } .commerce-price small { color: var(--text-muted); }

quantity.description: Quantity selector with increment and decrement controls.

default.css: .commerce-quantity { display: inline-grid; grid-template-columns: 2.5rem 3.5rem 2.5rem; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); } .commerce-quantity button, .commerce-quantity input { min-height: 2.5rem; border: 0; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); text-align: center; } .commerce-quantity button { cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.2rem; } .commerce-quantity input { border-inline: 1px solid var(--border); appearance: textfield; }
default.js: document.querySelectorAll('.commerce-quantity').forEach((root) => { const input = root.querySelector('input'); root.querySelectorAll('[data-step]').forEach((button) => button.addEventListener('click', () => { const next = Math.min(Number(input.max), Math.max(Number(input.min), Number(input.value) + Number(button.dataset.step))); input.value = String(next); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); })); });

cart-button.description: Add-to-cart button that dispatches a cart:add event.

primary.css: .commerce-cart-button { display: inline-flex; justify-content: center; padding: .65rem 1rem; border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); font-weight: 750; cursor: pointer; } .commerce-cart-button.is-added { background: var(--success); }
primary.js: document.querySelectorAll('.commerce-cart-button').forEach((button) => button.addEventListener('click', () => { button.classList.add('is-added'); const original = button.textContent; button.textContent = 'Added ✓'; button.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('cart:add', { bubbles: true, detail: { productId: button.dataset.productId } })); setTimeout(() => { button.classList.remove('is-added'); button.textContent = original; }, 1200); }));
